⚔️ Familiars

Top 5 results via Tavily search

  • Familiar - Wikipedia

    In European folklore of the medieval and early modern periods, familiars (strictly familiar spirits) were supernatural entities believed to assist witches and cunning folk in their practice of magic.

  • What Are Familiars? - Indigo Spirituality

    An accessible explainer on familiars from a Pagan perspective — covering their spiritual role, history, and how they are recognized in modern practice.

  • FAMILIARS — Vegan Cafe, Brooklyn

    A 100% vegan cafe in Brooklyn proudly serving Duh! Donuts, freshly baked everything bagels, and locally roasted Honeymoon Coffee.

  • Familiars Coffee & Tea — Northampton, MA

    A specialty coffee and tea shop in Northampton, MA, using locally sourced food and ingredients.

  • FAMILIARS Synonyms — Merriam-Webster

    Merriam-Webster thesaurus entry listing 77 synonyms and antonyms for 'familiars', including lovers, fans, regulars, patrons, and denizens.
